items.name: queryinsights-learning-to-rank
items.description: QueryInsights is a learning-to-rank system that demonstrates how search results can be ordered using machine learning. It compares logistic regression and XGBoost models, evaluates ranking quality with NDCG@10, and simulates potential click-through improvements using an offline A/B framework.

items.name: pybroker
items.description: Algorithmic Trading in Python with Machine Learning

items.name: Capital-Bikeshare-Demand-Prediction
items.description: This project provides a robust machine learning framework to predict hourly bike-sharing demand in Washington, D.C.. It features advanced preprocessing, including pandemic data removal, and complex feature engineering. The repository includes the full Python notebook, an academic paper, and a presentation deck.

items.name: Foam-Agent
items.description: Foam-Agent: An end-to-end, composable multi-agent framework for automating CFD simulations in OpenFOAM. NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop.

items.name: Credit-Risk-Modeling-and-Capital-Allocation-in-P2P-Lending
items.description: P2P lending platforms require effective credit risk assessment to balance default risk against expected returns. Using ~410,000 historical loans from Bondora (2009-2024), this analysis develops a machine learning framework to predict loan defaults and optimize portfolio capital allocation strategies for investors operating under limited capital.

items.name: Advanced-Discriminant-Analysis-Machine-Learning-and-Generalized-Logistic-Type-IV-Regression-Model
items.description: Integrated framework combining advanced discriminant analysis (LDA, QDA, regularized variants), machine learning models (RF, SVM, KNN, boosting, neural networks), and Generalized Logistic Type-IV regression for robust classification, nonlinear modeling, and improved predictive performance evaluation.

items.name: NeuroKinematics
items.description: Machine learning–based inverse kinematics pipeline for robotic manipulators. The project uses neural networks, forward kinematics–aware loss functions, and joint constraints to predict joint angles from end-effector poses. Designed as a modular and research-oriented framework.

items.description: This repository contains a collection of AI and Machine Learning projects built using various libraries and frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, and others. items.description: This project presents an Intelligent Food Recognition System using a Hybrid Machine Learning Framework that combines Convolutional Neural Networks and Support Vector Machines for better accuracy. The system processes food images by preprocessing, extracting features, and classifying them based on their characteristics

items.name: autoware-ml

items.description: Machine learning-based framework for predicting solar panel efficiency degradation due to dust accumulation based on environmental and operational factors. The dataset used contains dust density, temperature, humidity, irradiation, and power output features. Multiple regression models have been developed and tested.

items.description: Strat-ML: S&P 500 Alpha Generation Framework:- This repository contains a complete quantitative pipeline designed to outperform the S&P 500 Index using Machine Learning. The project focuses on out-of-sample signal generation using constituent-level OHLCV data, rigorous Blocking Time Series Cross-Validation, and a Long/Short Stock Picking strategy.

items.name: Dynamic-Context-Based-Wildfire-Risk-Prediction-System
items.description: This project presents a dynamic, unsupervised machine learning framework for predicting wildfire risk using multivariate weather time-series data. Unlike traditional static wildfire danger indices, this system adapts to temporal variations in environmental conditions using context-based modeling and anomaly detection.

items.name: AI-Assisted-Web-Application-Vulnerability-Detection-and-False-Positive-Reduction-Framework

It uses Burp Suite to detect common vulnerabilities and applies a machine learning model to classify results as true or false positives, reducing false alarms and improving detection accuracy.

This system classifies tweets as:  ✅ Human-written  🤖 AI-generated

It helps users navigate the transition from old Indian laws (IPC/CrPC/IEA) to the new **BNS/BNSS/BSA** frameworks. Using local Machine Learning and OCR, it analyzes legal documents and maps law sections with 100% grounded accuracy.
